name: agentboard
description: Codex plugin for AgentBoard project and workspace orchestration workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Structured project and workspace orchestration for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use AgentBoard from Codex to run phase-based projects, manage workspace boards, build specs, sweep codebases, and orchestrate planning, review, implementation, and audit work.
defaultPrompt: Use AgentBoard to start or resume a structured project workflow
Create a spec and workspace board for this codebase
Sweep this repo and turn findings into AgentBoard cards
